about.title: I'm Outmane, a passionate developer based in Morocco
about.description1: With over 3 years of experience in mobile and web development, I specialize in creating seamless digital experiences that bridge the gap between design and functionality. My journey started with a curiosity for how things work, which evolved into a passion for building products that make a difference.
about.description2: I believe in clean code, intuitive interfaces, and the power of collaboration. When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open-source projects, or sharing knowledge with the developer community.

mobile_apps.title: MOBILE APPS
mobile_apps.description: Developing high-quality cross-platform mobile applications primarily with Flutter.
mobile_apps.details: I specialize in building feature-rich mobile apps that run smoothly on both iOS and Android. From initial concept to deployment, I handle the entire lifecycle of mobile app development.

development.title: DEVELOPMENT
development.description: Building performant and scalable web applications using React, Node.js, and modern tools.
development.details: I focus on clean architecture, optimized performance, and seamless user experiences. Whether it's a simple landing page or a complex web platform, I ensure high-quality code and maintainability.

designing.title: DESIGNING
designing.description: Crafting beautiful and intuitive user interfaces with a focus on user experience.
designing.details: Using Figma, I create modern, aesthetically pleasing designs that are both functional and delightful. My design process includes wireframing, prototyping, and high-fidelity UI design.

projects.title: EXAM ASSISTANT
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Study Companion
projects.description: A Flutter mobile app that helps students prepare for exams using AI-generated quizzes, smart flashcards, and personalized study plans.
projects.fullStory: Exam Assistant was built to solve a real problem students face every semester — scattered notes, last-minute cramming, and no clear study path. On the mobile side, the app is built with Flutter using Clean Architecture and BLoC for state management, keeping the codebase scalable, testable, and easy to maintain. Authentication, AI services, and data processing are handled by a separate Flask backend — our focus stays on delivering a polished cross-platform mobile experience. From onboarding to daily practice sessions, every screen was designed for focus and momentum.
features: AI-generated quizzes from uploaded notes and PDFs
Personalized daily study plans based on exam dates
Offline mode with local Hive cache
Dark & light themes with Material 3 design
Clean Architecture with BLoC state management

tools.name: Clean Architecture
tools.role: Layered app structure & separation of concerns

tools.name: Flask Backend
tools.role: Authentication, AI integration & REST API services

projects.title: CAP
projects.subtitle: AI Prediction & Analysis Platform
projects.description: A mobile app where users submit predictions, get in-depth LLM-powered analysis, and earn rewards when their insights prove accurate.
projects.fullStory: CAP turns everyday predictions into a structured, monetizable experience. Users submit their forecasts on topics they care about, and a large language model analyzes each submission — breaking down reasoning, confidence, and context. When predictions hit the mark, users get paid, creating a loop of engagement, learning, and reward. Built with Flutter using Clean Architecture and BLoC, the app focuses on a smooth submission flow, clear analysis results, and transparent payout tracking.
features: Submit predictions on custom topics and events
LLM-powered analysis of reasoning and confidence
Secure user profiles and payout management

tools.name: Clean Architecture
tools.role: Layered app structure & separation of concerns

projects.title: UNIVERSE FRANCE SUCCESS
projects.subtitle: By NBIT · Student Finance Manager
projects.description: A Flutter app by NBIT that helps students in France track spending, manage budgets, and stay in control of their money throughout the academic year.
projects.fullStory: Universe France Success was developed by NBIT for the real financial challenges students face while studying in France — rent, groceries, transport, and social life on a tight budget. The app helps users set monthly limits, categorize expenses, and visualize where their money goes with clean charts and reminders. Built with Flutter, Clean Architecture, and BLoC, it delivers a fast, intuitive mobile experience tailored to the French student lifestyle, with local currency support and practical budgeting tools.
features: Monthly budget planning and expense tracking
Designed for students living in France

tools.name: Clean Architecture
tools.role: Layered app structure & separation of concerns

projects.title: EMS
projects.subtitle: Electricity & Water Management
projects.description: A utility management app for monitoring electricity and water consumption, tracking usage patterns, and helping users reduce waste and costs.
projects.fullStory: EMS gives households and facilities a clear view of their electricity and water usage in one place. Users can log meter readings, compare consumption over time, set alerts for unusual spikes, and access tips to optimize their utility bills. The app was built with Flutter using Clean Architecture and BLoC, prioritizing readable dashboards, reliable data entry, and a practical workflow for day-to-day utility management.
features: Meter reading logs with date history
